title: Select Agent CLI
description: Select the CLI you prefer to use when Desktop later shows prompt guidance.

skipConfirm.title: Confirm Skip?
skipConfirm.message: If you skip this step, Desktop will still show prompt guidance, but it will not highlight a preferred tool.

help.title: Help
help.ensureConfigured: Configure whichever CLI you plan to use so you can paste prompt guidance into it later.
help.configLocation: Desktop only stores your preference and documentation shortcuts.
help.configInstructions: You can always change this later from Settings.
help.whyRequired: This preference is optional and only affects which tool is recommended first.

future.label: Coming Soon
future.description: This feature is not yet available
